items.title: The effectiveness of cardiovascular rehabilitation for transient ischaemic attack and mild stroke: A randomised controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 140 TIA and mild stroke participants found no significant difference in functional exercise capacity, physical activity, anthropometrics, blood pressure, or quality-of-life over 6 months between integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation and usual care.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，针对短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）和轻度卒中患者的综合心血管康复，在 6 个月内未能显示优于常规护理的额外益处。这意味着你不应期望其超越常规护理的干预效果，而是继续评估个体需求。
items.titleZh: 心血管康复对短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的有效性：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 140 名短暂性脑缺血发作和轻度卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，为期 6 个月的综合心血管康复在功能运动能力、身体活动、人体测量学、血压或生活质量方面未显示优于常规护理的显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation for TIA and mild stroke patients did not show additional benefits over usual care within 6 months. This means you should not expect it to surpass the effects of usual care, and should continue to assess individual needs.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是综合心血管康复方案的整体效果，未细致探究方案中各组成部分的单独贡献。
items.limitationEn: The study focused on the overall effectiveness of an integrated cardiovascular rehabilitation program, not the individual contributions of its components.

items.title: Prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating in athletes: a systematic review and meta-analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis estimated the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes across training levels and assessment methods, identifying associated moderators.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了运动员中饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率，并识别了相关调节因素。这提示你在评估和管理运动员时，需要警惕这些心理健康问题，将其纳入全面的康复和表现优化计划。
items.titleZh: 运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析估计了不同训练水平和评估方法下运动员饮食失调和紊乱性进食的患病率，并识别了相关的调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights that the prevalence of eating disorders and disordered eating among athletes should not be overlooked. When assessing and managing athletes, you need to actively screen for these mental health issues and integrate them into comprehensive rehabilitation and performance optimization plans to safeguard athletes' long-term health.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析结果的异质性可能较高，且部分研究依赖自我报告评估，可能存在偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Meta-analysis results may have high heterogeneity, and some studies relying on self-reported assessments may introduce bias.

items.title: Subtype-specific optimal cut-off values of the Berg Balance Scale for predicting independent walking in inpatient stroke rehabilitation: a multicentre cohort study.
items.summary: A multicenter retrospective cohort study of 565 stroke patients in South Korea derived subtype-specific optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale to predict independent walking at discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项涵盖 565 名韩国卒中患者的多中心研究，为 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）预测出院时独立行走能力，提供了亚型特异性（缺血性/出血性）的最佳临界值。这对你的临床决策非常有用，让你能更早、更准确地预判患者的步行康复潜力，从而优化康复目标。
items.titleZh: 亚型特异性 Berg 平衡量表最佳临界值预测住院卒中康复患者的独立行走能力：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对韩国 565 名卒中患者的多中心回顾性队列研究，推导了 Berg 平衡量表的亚型特异性最佳临界值，以预测其出院时的独立行走能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter study of 565 stroke patients in South Korea provides subtype-specific (ischemic/hemorrhagic) optimal cut-off values for the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) to predict independent walking ability at discharge. This is highly useful for your clinical decision-making, allowing you to predict patients' walking rehabilitation potential earlier and more accurately, thereby optimizing rehabilitation goals.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，可能存在数据收集不完整或偏倚，且研究人群仅限于韩国住院康复患者，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective cohort design may have incomplete or biased data collection, and the study population is limited to Korean inpatient rehabilitation patients, limiting generalizability.

items.title: The psychosocial impacts of having eating and drinking difficulties after stroke: a qualitative evidence synthesis.
items.summary: A systematic qualitative evidence synthesis of 22 studies (645 informants) identified two overarching domains of psychosocial impacts—psychological and social—related to eating and drinking difficulties after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性证据合成揭示了卒中后吞咽障碍对患者、照顾者和医疗专业人员的社会心理影响。这提醒你，康复不仅要关注生理功能，更要关注吞咽障碍带来的情感困扰和社会隔离，提供更全面的支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后饮食困难的社会心理影响：一项定性证据合成
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 22 项研究（645 名受访者）的系统定性证据合成，识别出卒中后饮食困难带来的两大社会心理影响领域：心理和社会影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative evidence synthesis reveals the psychosocial impacts of eating and drinking difficulties after stroke on patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals. This reminds you that rehabilitation must address not only physiological function but also the emotional distress and social isolation caused by dysphagia, providing more comprehensive support.
items.limitation: 定性研究侧重于经验而非量化效果，其发现基于个人叙述和解释，不提供干预有效性的统计证据。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative research focuses on experiences rather than quantitative effects, and findings are based on personal narratives and interpretations, not statistical evidence of intervention effectiveness.

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: An exploratory retrospective cohort study of 333 adult patients undergoing elective ACDF found that sarcopenia increases the risk of radiographic adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of index surgery.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究指出，肌少症会增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后 3 年内邻近节段退变的风险。这对你识别高风险患者、提供术前术后营养及康复建议具有重要意义，提醒你关注肌少症的预后影响。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后 3 年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 333 名择期进行颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术成人患者的回顾性队列研究发现，肌少症增加了初次手术后 3 年内影像学邻近节段退变的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study indicates that sarcopenia increases the risk of adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years of anterior cervical discectomy and fusion (ACDF). This is crucial for identifying high-risk patients and providing pre- and post-operative nutritional and rehabilitation advice, reminding you to consider the prognostic impact of sarcopenia.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且仅观察 3 年随访期，对长期影响尚需更多证据。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective cohort design may have confounders and selection bias, and the 3-year follow-up period may not capture long-term effects.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: A pragmatic quasi-experimental study evaluated the effectiveness of a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) on physical, psychological, and social outcomes in 72 institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia in Taiwan.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究显示，12 周的体感游戏干预（Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对机构养老的老年肌少症患者具有多领域益处，包括身体、心理和社会结果。这为你将体感游戏纳入老年康复方案提供了有力证据，尤其是在改善依从性和动机方面。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结果
items.summaryZh: 一项务实的准实验研究评估了为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（任天堂 Switch 健身环大冒险）对台湾 72 名机构养老老年肌少症患者的身体、心理和社会结果的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This quasi-experimental study demonstrates that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) offers multi-domain benefits for institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia, including physical, psychological, and social outcomes. This provides strong evidence for integrating exergaming into geriatric rehabilitation, especially for improving adherence and motivation.
items.limitation: 准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在难以控制的混杂因素，且研究人群为机构养老的老年人，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The quasi-experimental design, not an RCT, may have uncontrollable confounders, and the study population of institutionalized older adults limits generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective observational study monitored 4450 athletes during the 14-day Paris 2024 Paralympic Games, reporting 535 injuries (prevalence = 10.9%) with an incidence of 8.6 per 1000 athlete days.
items.curatedReason: 巴黎 2024 残奥会的伤病监测数据显示，在 4450 名运动员中发生了 535 例损伤，伤病流行率为 10.9%。这份研究让你对残疾运动员的伤病模式有了更清晰的认识，有助于你制定更具针对性的预防和康复策略，提升他们的运动安全。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病发生率：疫情后趋势和运动特异性风险
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察研究在 2024 年巴黎残奥会期间监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（患病率为 10.9%），发生率为每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on the epidemiology of injuries and illnesses at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games provides you with specific injury incidence and patterns across various Paralympic sports. This helps you tailor prevention and rehabilitation strategies for para-athletes, optimizing their performance and health.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，仅描述伤病发生率和模式，不涉及干预措施的有效性评估。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it describes injury incidence and patterns without evaluating the effectiveness of interventions.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is presented as a generative foundation model of walking kinematics that enables various downstream clinical tasks across diverse patient populations using clinically accessible smartphone video-based gait analysis, aggregating eight gait datasets from 65 subjects.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder 模型旨在通过智能手机视频步态分析，为多种临床应用提供步态运动学基础模型。如果这项技术成熟，它能大幅降低步态分析的门槛，帮助你在临床实践中更便捷地进行定量步态评估。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多样化临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder 被提出为一个生成式步态运动学基础模型，通过临床可用的智能手机视频步态分析，支持跨不同患者群体的多种下游临床任务，该模型聚合了来自 65 名受试者的 8 个步态数据集。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model aims to provide a foundational model of gait kinematics for various clinical applications using smartphone video gait analysis. If this technology matures, it could significantly lower the barrier to gait analysis, helping you conduct quantitative gait assessments more conveniently in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 预印本研究，尚未经过同行评审，其方法学和结论需谨慎对待。
items.limitationEn: This is a preprint study, not yet peer-reviewed, so its methodology and conclusions should be approached with caution.

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified 36 studies on lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, including exercise and weight management, mapping their range, characteristics, and outcome measures.
items.curatedReason: 针对膝骨关节炎，这份系统综述为你梳理了 36 项生活方式干预研究，主要涵盖运动和体重管理。它为你描绘了现有证据的全貌，能帮助你设计更全面的患者教育和初步干预方案，知道哪些方面已有证据，哪些还有待探索。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索：一项范围界定综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围界定综述从 36 项研究（包括 29 项 RCT）中提取数据，探索了膝骨关节炎生活方式干预（如运动和体重管理）的范围、特征和评估结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For knee osteoarthritis, this scoping review synthesizes 36 studies on lifestyle interventions, primarily covering exercise and weight management. It maps the full spectrum of existing evidence, helping you design more comprehensive patient education and initial intervention plans, clarifying where evidence exists and where further exploration is needed.
items.limitation: 本综述未报告汇总的效应量或异质性数据，无法评估干预效果的综合强度。
items.limitationEn: The review did not report pooled effect sizes or heterogeneity data, limiting assessment of the interventions' overall strength.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian university teaching hospital assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and costs of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这份尼日利亚的 10 年回顾性研究，提供了该地区 1582 名肌肉骨骼疾病患者的物理治疗实际数据。你可以从中了解不同地域诊疗模式和成本的差异，但请记住，这是单中心观察性研究，结论外推需谨慎。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项对尼日利亚 1582 名患者进行为期 10 年的回顾性研究，评估了物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本，发现平均年龄为 47.8 ± 25.7 岁，女性占多数。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year retrospective study from Nigeria provides real-world data on physiotherapy for 1582 musculoskeletal disorder patients in that region. You can gain insights into regional differences in treatment patterns and costs, but remember this is a single-center observational study, so generalize its conclusions with caution.
items.limitation: 研究为单中心回顾性设计，可能存在选择偏倚和数据完整性问题，且结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study's single-center, retrospective design may introduce selection bias and data completeness issues, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Evidence-based physical therapy protocols were developed for six types of megaprostheses after bone tumor resection through literature search and a consensus procedure involving orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists.
items.curatedReason: 这份骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体重建患者的物理治疗方案是基于共识和临床试点开发的，为你处理这类复杂病例提供了系统化的循证指导。这是罕见病种康复的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除后巨型假体植入患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 通过文献检索和骨科肿瘤外科医生与物理治疗师的共识程序，为六种不同类型的巨型假体植入患者开发了基于证据的物理治疗方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: These physical therapy protocols for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection, developed through consensus and clinical piloting, offer systematic evidence-based guidance for managing such complex cases. This is a crucial reference for rare condition rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 方案开发基于专家共识和单中心试点，且未提供对照组数据，证据等级非 RCT。
items.limitationEn: The protocol development was based on expert consensus and single-center piloting without a control group, thus not reaching RCT evidence levels.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study using in-depth interviews with 15 patients explored expectations and experiences of physical therapist-led triage for hip or knee osteoarthritis in a Swedish orthopedic clinic.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了髋膝骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。理解患者视角有助于优化分诊流程和沟通，提升患者满意度和参与度。
items.titleZh: 安全之手——髋膝骨关节炎患者在二级医疗机构中对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和经验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 15 名髋膝骨关节炎患者的探索性定性研究，通过深度访谈探讨了患者对瑞典骨科诊所物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores hip and knee OA patients' expectations and experiences with PT-led triage. Understanding the patient perspective helps optimize triage processes and communication, improving patient satisfaction and engagement.
items.limitation: 研究为定性设计，样本量小，结果不具统计学通用性，且仅反映瑞典单一诊所患者的经验。
items.limitationEn: The qualitative design, small sample size, and single-clinic focus limit the generalizability of the findings.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity examined the associations of functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with total physical activity level.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究提示，其身体活动水平与功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状及感知障碍之间存在关联。在临床实践中，你需要意识到这些因素可能相互影响，不能孤立看待，但请记住，这只是关联性研究，无法推断因果。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状和功能能力
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 85 名肥胖女性的横断面研究，考察了功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与总身体活动水平之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity suggests associations between their physical activity levels, functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers. In clinical practice, you need to be aware that these factors may interact and should not be viewed in isolation, but remember this is an associational study and cannot infer causality.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系，且所有变量均为自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and self-reported measures may introduce recall bias.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: Cross-sectional analyses of a population-based cohort of 605 individuals with newly diagnosed spinal cord injury described the distribution and risk factors for sexual dysfunction during primary rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于人群队列的描述性分析，详细描绘了脊髓损伤患者早期康复期间的性功能障碍及其风险因素。这提示你，在 SCI 患者康复中，应更早、更全面地筛查和管理性功能问题，以提升患者生活质量。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者初级康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 605 名新诊断脊髓损伤患者进行的人群队列横断面分析，描述了初级康复期间性功能障碍的分布及其风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This population-based descriptive analysis meticulously outlines sexual dysfunction and its risk factors during early rehabilitation for spinal cord injury patients. This suggests you should screen for and manage sexual function issues earlier and more comprehensively in SCI rehabilitation to improve patients' quality of life.
items.limitation: 横断面分析仅描述关联，不能确定因果关系，且所有数据来自瑞士的四个中心，可能存在地理和医疗系统特异性。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional analysis only describes associations, not causality, and all data are from four Swiss centers, potentially introducing geographical and healthcare system specificities.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies for stroke survivors during the hospital-to-home transition.
items.curatedReason: 如果你在为卒中幸存者规划出院后的远程康复，这份范围界定综述是个不错的起点。它系统梳理了现有远程康复的干预模式、评估指标和证据空白，帮你避免重复研究，聚焦于真正未解决的临床需求。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者出院回家过渡期的远程康复：一项范围界定综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围界定综述识别并映射了针对卒中幸存者在出院回家过渡期中远程康复的干预模式、结局领域和证据空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you are planning telerehabilitation for stroke survivors post-discharge, this scoping review is an excellent starting point. It systematically maps existing telerehabilitation intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps, helping you avoid redundant research and focus on truly unmet clinical needs.
items.limitation: 作为范围界定综述，它主要映射现有文献，未进行质量评估或荟萃分析，不提供干预效果的综合量化证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily maps existing literature without quality assessment or meta-analysis, thus not providing quantitative evidence of intervention effects.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study investigated the associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective measures of balance and gait in hemiparetic individuals.
items.curatedReason: 偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉（足底感觉、位置觉、运动觉）受损与平衡、步态异常存在关联。这项研究通过量化分析，进一步强调了本体感觉在卒中康复中的核心地位，提醒你在评估和干预中，务必将本体感觉作为重点环节。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究调查了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡和步态客观测量之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) are associated with balance and gait abnormalities in hemiparetic individuals. This study, through quantitative analysis, further emphasizes the central role of proprioception in stroke rehabilitation, reminding you to prioritize proprioception in both assessment and intervention.
items.limitation: 横断面研究不能确立因果关系，其发现可能受其他未测量混杂因素影响。
items.limitationEn: The cross-sectional design prevents establishing causality, and findings may be influenced by unmeasured confounders.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A within-subject repeated-measures study with 27 stroke patients investigated the effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究对比了空间和时间优先的言语指令对卒中患者步态参数的影响。结果提示，你可以根据患者具体的步态不对称模式，选择性地使用不同类型的指令，以优化步态训练效果。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先的言语指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项受试者内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 27 名卒中患者的受试者内重复测量研究，考察了空间和时间优先的言语指令与无优先级指令相比，对时空步态参数的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares the effects of spatial and temporal prioritized verbal instructions on gait parameters in stroke patients. The results suggest you can selectively use different types of instructions based on specific gait asymmetry patterns to optimize gait training outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（27 例卒中患者），且为单中心设计，结果可能不具广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size (27 stroke patients) and a single-center design, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study in an outpatient clinic examined the feasibility of integrating a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia, exploring preliminary language performance outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 将音乐疗法纳入卒中后失语症的言语治疗，似乎具有可行性，并初步显示出改善语言表现的潜力。但请注意，这是一项准实验研究，且实验组增加了总治疗时间，因此不宜立即将其作为标准方案推广，可以考虑作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言康复中的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在门诊进行的准实验研究，探讨了将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言治疗中的可行性，并初步探索了语言表现结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating music therapy into speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia appears feasible and shows preliminary potential for improving language performance. However, be aware that this is a quasi-experimental study, and the experimental group received increased total therapy time. Therefore, it should not be immediately adopted as a standard protocol, but rather considered as an adjunct.
items.limitation: 准实验设计，而非随机对照试验，可能存在混杂因素，且实验组的总治疗接触时间增加，可能导致结果偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The quasi-experimental design, not an RCT, may have confounders, and the increased total therapeutic contact time in the experimental group could bias results.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This commentary highlights that monitoring an athlete's performance-state after return-to-sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice, despite extensive focus on return-to-sport testing.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了 ACL 损伤运动员在重返赛场后，持续监测其表现状态的重大挑战。它提醒你，康复和重返运动不仅仅是达到出院标准，更是一个长期动态的过程，需要更细致的长期监测策略。
items.titleZh: ACL损伤运动员重返赛场后的表现状态监测是研究和实践中的重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评强调，尽管人们高度关注重返运动测试，但监测 ACL 损伤运动员重返赛场后的表现状态在研究和实践中仍是一个重大挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights the significant challenge of continuously monitoring performance in athletes after ACL injury return-to-sport. It reminds you that rehabilitation and return-to-sport are not just about meeting discharge criteria, but a long-term, dynamic process requiring more nuanced, long-term monitoring strategies.
items.limitation: 述评性质，不提供新的实证数据，主要基于现有文献和专家观点。
items.limitationEn: As a commentary, it offers no new empirical data, relying mainly on existing literature and expert opinions.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke neuro-rehabilitation patients demonstrated that incomplete routine cognitive assessments can yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项对卒中后认知评估数据不完整性的研究表明，即使数据不完整，仍能提取出有临床意义的认知、临床和背景变量关系。这意味着在实际临床中，你可以利用有限的神经心理数据进行患者分层和初步判断，提高数据利用率。
items.titleZh: 卒中后亚急性期康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名卒中后亚急性期神经康复患者进行的回顾性队列研究表明，不完整的常规认知评估仍能揭示认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on incomplete cognitive assessment data post-stroke suggests that clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables can still be extracted. This means you can use limited neuropsychological data for patient stratification and initial judgments in clinical practice, improving data utilization.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性设计，存在数据收集偏倚和缺失数据的固有局限性，其结果可能受既有记录质量影响。
items.limitationEn: The retrospective design has inherent limitations regarding data collection bias and missing data, and results may be affected by the quality of existing records.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An exploratory observational study involved six pediatric physiotherapists and two clients each with neurodevelopmental disorders to examine the use of focus of attention for instructions and feedback during telehealth.
items.curatedReason: 这份针对六名儿科物理治疗师远程康复实践的探索性研究，展示了在指导和反馈中运用“注意力焦点”的策略。在资源有限或远程康复场景下，你可以借鉴这些策略来优化对神经发育障碍儿童的干预，提升治疗效率和依从性。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中指导和反馈的注意力焦点运用：一项观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性观察研究，涉及 6 名儿科物理治疗师和他们各自的 2 名神经发育障碍患者，旨在考察远程医疗中指导和反馈的注意力焦点运用情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study of six pediatric physical therapists' telerehabilitation practices demonstrates strategies for using 'focus of attention' in instruction and feedback. In resource-limited or telerehabilitation settings, you can adopt these strategies to optimize interventions for children with neurodevelopmental disorders, improving treatment efficiency and adherence.
items.limitation: 研究为探索性观察性设计，样本量小（6 名治疗师和 12 名儿童），结果不具广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: The study's exploratory observational design has a small sample size (6 therapists, 12 children), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded, pragmatic randomized controlled trial with 140 cancer survivors found that an 8-week, twice-weekly, physiotherapist-led exercise group via videoconferencing was safe but not superior to a single in-person assessment and advice session for improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，基于运动的癌症远程康复在改善生活质量方面并不优于一次性物理治疗评估和建议，但其安全性良好。这意味着远程康复对癌症幸存者而言是安全的替代方案，尤其在可及性受限时，但短期内别期望其在生活质量上带来显著额外优势。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但改善生活质量方面不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 140 名癌症幸存者的评估者盲法、实用型随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周、每周两次、由物理治疗师主导的视频会议运动小组是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is not superior to a single physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life, though it is safe. This means telerehabilitation is a safe alternative for cancer survivors, especially when accessibility is limited, but don't expect significant additional benefits in quality of life in the short term.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了生活质量、活动和功能等患者报告结局，未深入探讨生理性或生物标志物结局，也未提供长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed patient-reported outcomes like quality of life, activity, and function, without delving into physiological or biomarker outcomes, and lacked long-term follow-up data.

items.title: Figure-of-Eight Taping Combined with Rehabilitation for Multidirectional Shoulder Instability in a School-Age Female Karate Athlete: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes a 12-year-old female karate athlete with multidirectional shoulder instability whose exercise therapy was facilitated by figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这个病例报告展示了“8”字贴扎配合康复在一位年轻空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳中的应用。虽然是初步证据，但提醒你手法辅助在严重不稳情况下的潜在价值，可以作为复杂病例的辅助选项。
items.titleZh: “8”字贴扎配合康复治疗学龄女性空手道运动员多方向肩关节不稳：一病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一则病例报告描述了一名 12 岁女性空手道运动员的多方向肩关节不稳，其运动疗法通过“8”字贴扎配合康复得到了有效促进。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report demonstrates figure-of-eight taping combined with rehabilitation for multidirectional shoulder instability in a young karate athlete. While preliminary, it highlights the potential value of manual adjuncts in severe instability, offering an auxiliary option for complex cases.
items.limitation: 单病例报告，证据级别低，结果不具外推性，仅供参考。
items.limitationEn: As a single case report, the evidence level is low and the findings are not generalizable.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 137 patients found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model exceeded national completion benchmarks (70.9% vs. 43%), with 96% of completers achieving minimal clinically important differences.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究提示，先进的虚拟物理治疗模式可能比全国平均水平更能提升患者的治疗完成率（70.9% vs. 43%），并且有 96% 的完成者达到了临床意义的改善。这意味着远程医疗在提高依从性方面有巨大潜力，但大规模 RCT 才能确认其长期效果。
items.titleZh: 一种先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模式的患者参与度、临床结局和满意度：一项回顾性队列研究。
items.titleEn: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summaryZh: 一项涉及 137 名患者的回顾性队列研究发现，先进的骨科虚拟物理治疗模式的完成率（70.9% vs 43%）远超全国基准，且 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study suggests advanced virtual PT models may significantly improve patient completion rates (70.9% vs. 43%) over national averages, with 96% of completers achieving clinically meaningful improvements. This indicates telehealth's potential for adherence, but large RCTs are needed to confirm long-term effectiveness.
items.limitation: 回顾性设计，存在选择偏倚的可能。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective design may be subject to selection bias.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that those receiving preoperative physiotherapy before total knee arthroplasty (TKA) showed better outcomes (KOOS-PS, pain) at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively compared to those who did not.
items.curatedReason: 一项基于瑞典注册数据的队列研究表明，接受术前物理治疗的 TKA 患者在术后 2 个月和 1 年时，在 KOOS-PS、疼痛和功能方面均显示出更好的结局。这为在 TKA 患者中推广术前物理治疗提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 初次全膝关节置换术前物理治疗与术后一年的患者报告结局：一项包含 1,688 名患者的注册研究。
items.titleEn: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 1,688 名患者的注册队列研究发现，接受初次全膝关节置换术 (TKA) 前物理治疗的患者，在术后 2 个月和 1 年时，KOOS-PS 和疼痛评分均优于未接受术前治疗的患者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This registry-based cohort study from Sweden suggests that patients undergoing preoperative physiotherapy for TKA demonstrate improved outcomes in KOOS-PS, pain, and function at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively, providing strong evidence for its wider adoption.
items.limitation: 观察性研究，无法完全排除混杂因素对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: Observational study, cannot fully exclude the influence of confounding factors on outcomes.

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 60 patients with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome found that a combined treatment of conventional physiotherapy and therapeutic massage resulted in greater short-term improvements in pain, pressure pain threshold, and functional disability compared to either treatment alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了慢性肌筋膜疼痛综合征 (MPS) 患者的常规 PT、治疗性按摩和联合治疗。结果显示，联合治疗在短期内对疼痛、压痛阈值和功能残疾的改善优于单独一种疗法。提示将按摩整合进 PT 方案可增强疗效。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或联合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期疗效：一项随机对照试验。
items.titleEn: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 60 名慢性斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，联合常规物理治疗和治疗性按摩的疗法，在短期内比单独使用任一种疗法更能改善疼痛、压痛阈值和功能残疾。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT comparing conventional PT, therapeutic massage, and combined treatment for chronic MPS found that the combined approach offered superior short-term improvements in pain, pressure pain threshold, and functional disability over single modalities. This suggests integrating massage into PT protocols may enhance outcomes.
items.limitation: 短期效应，长期疗效有待观察。
items.limitationEn: Short-term effects observed; long-term efficacy requires further investigation.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study characterizing patients in Spanish private vestibular physiotherapy clinics found a diverse patient profile, suggesting limited access to vestibular rehabilitation despite its proven efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 该研究描述了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所的患者特征。结果显示，患者群体多样，但前庭康复的普及度仍有限，提示需要加强相关教育和转诊策略。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所的患者特征：一项横断面研究。
items.titleEn: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summaryZh: 一项描述西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者特征的横断面研究发现，患者群体多样，但前庭康复的普及度仍有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study profiles patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain, revealing a diverse patient population but continued limited access to vestibular rehabilitation, suggesting a need for enhanced education and referral strategies.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法确定因果关系，且主要针对私人诊所。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, cannot establish causality; focuses primarily on private clinics.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: Comparing triceps surae neuromuscular activity during single-leg jumping tasks, this study hypothesized that individuals after ACL reconstruction (ACLR) would demonstrate lower activity compared to healthy controls, and examined bilateral differences within the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了 ACLR 患者和健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中的腓肠肌神经肌肉活动。结果显示 ACLR 患者腓肠肌活动度可能较低，提示在重返运动训练中需关注小腿肌肉的全面恢复。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中的腓肠肌神经肌肉活动。
items.titleEn: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summaryZh: 本研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术 (ACLR) 患者和健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中的腓肠肌神经肌肉活动，并考察了 ACLR 患者双侧的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study compares triceps surae neuromuscular activity during single-leg jumping between ACLR patients and healthy controls. The findings suggest potentially reduced activity in ACLR individuals, warning that comprehensive calf muscle recovery and functional integration must be prioritized in their return-to-sport training.
items.limitation: 仅比较了腓肠肌的活动，可能无法完全反映整体下肢生物力学。
items.limitationEn: Focuses solely on triceps surae activity, potentially not capturing overall lower limb biomechanics.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An 8-week visual perturbation training program significantly improved lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors during unanticipated cutting in male athletes post-ACLR, suggesting its utility for return-to-sport protocols.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 证实，对于 ACLR 男性运动员，为期 8 周的视觉干扰训练能够显著改善其在非预期切入动作中的下肢生物力学表现和减少错误。这为 ACLR 患者重返运动的训练方案提供了强有力的循证支持，可以考虑加入。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员在非预期切入动作中的视觉干扰训练八周效果：一项随机对照临床试验 (RCT)。
items.titleEn: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summaryZh: 一项为期八周的视觉干扰训练显著改善了前交叉韧带重建术 (ACLR) 后男性运动员在非预期切入动作中的下肢生物力学和错误，提示其对重返运动方案的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT provides strong evidence that 8 weeks of visual perturbation training significantly improves lower-limb biomechanics and reduces errors during unanticipated cutting in male athletes post-ACLR. Clinicians should consider incorporating this into return-to-sport protocols.
items.limitation: 研究对象为男性运动员，女性或非运动员的适用性待定。
items.limitationEn: Participants were male athletes; applicability to females or non-athletes remains to be determined.

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey of physical therapists treating pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury explored factors influencing clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT), revealing uncertainties in its application.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查旨在了解在儿科和青少年 ACL 损伤患者中使用血流限制训练 (BFRT) 的临床决策因素。结果显示，PT 在 BFRT 应用方面存在不确定性，提示需要更多关于其安全性和有效性的指导。
items.titleZh: 儿科和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者血流限制训练的临床决策相关因素。
items.titleEn: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对治疗儿科和青少年前交叉韧带损伤患者的物理治疗师的调查，探讨了影响血流限制训练 (BFRT) 临床决策的因素，并揭示了其应用中的不确定性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey explores clinical decision-making factors for Blood Flow Restriction Training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury. Findings reveal uncertainties among PTs regarding BFRT application, highlighting a need for more guidance on its safety and efficacy.
items.limitation: 横断面调查，仅反映 PT 的观点，缺乏实际治疗数据。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional survey reflects PT perspectives, lacking data on actual treatment outcomes.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that dynamic taping (DT) may provide immediate improvements in dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability compared to sports taping (ST).
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了动态贴扎 (DT) 和运动贴扎 (ST) 对慢性踝关节不稳 (CAI) 运动爱好者的动态平衡和本体感觉的影响。结果显示，DT 在即时效果上可能优于 ST，但仍需更多研究来确认其长期益处。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎与 Kinesio 贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响。
items.titleEn: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎 (DT) 可能比运动贴扎 (ST) 更能即时改善慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的动态平衡和本体感觉。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares the immediate effects of dynamic taping (DT) and sports taping (ST) on dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with chronic ankle instability (CAI). DT may offer superior immediate benefits, but more research is needed to confirm its long-term advantages.
items.limitation: 仅评估了即时效应，长期效果和对运动表现的影响有待研究。
items.limitationEn: Assessed only immediate effects; long-term outcomes and impact on athletic performance require investigation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that Kinesio taping and Mulligan taping, when combined with treadmill training, improved ankle dorsiflexion, balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients compared to treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在慢性卒中患者的康复训练中，联合使用 Kinesio 贴扎或 Mulligan 贴扎（与单纯运动训练相比）能够进一步改善踝关节背屈活动度、平衡能力和跌倒自我效能感。这意味着贴扎技术可以作为辅助手段，但需谨慎评估其相对效益。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 贴扎与 Mulligan 贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的影响：一项随机对照试验。
items.titleEn: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎和 Mulligan 贴扎联合跑步机训练，在慢性卒中患者中比单独的跑步机训练更能改善踝关节背屈、平衡和跌倒功效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that combining Kinesio or Mulligan taping with treadmill training improves ankle dorsiflexion, balance, and fall efficacy in chronic stroke patients more than treadmill training alone. While taping can be a useful adjunct, its relative benefits warrant careful consideration.
items.limitation: 样本量较小，且研究对象为慢性卒中患者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size and focus on chronic stroke patients limit generalizability.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 athletes with confirmed acute respiratory infections identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, with median days to return-to-training, return-to-full-training, and return-to-full-performance recorded.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究明确了影响急性呼吸道感染后运动员重返运动（训练、完全训练、完全表现）的因素。虽然是观察性研究，但它提示我们，制定个体化的康复计划，考虑这些因素，可能有助于加速运动员的安全回归。
items.titleZh: 病原体确诊的急性呼吸道感染后运动员重返运动结局的相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.titleEn: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 名运动员急性呼吸道感染的研究，确定了影响重返运动（包括重返训练、完全训练和完全运动表现）的因素，并记录了相应的中位数天数。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study identifies factors affecting return-to-sport outcomes (training, full training, full performance) after acute respiratory infections in athletes. While observational, it suggests that individualized rehabilitation plans incorporating these factors may facilitate safer and faster athlete return.
items.limitation: 研究主要关注急性呼吸道感染，对其他类型感染的适用性待定。
items.limitationEn: Focuses on acute respiratory infections; applicability to other infection types is undetermined.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: A qualitative study involving in-depth interviews with adults with heart failure identified patient-reported barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation, noting themes such as reduced physical capacity and lack of motivation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入访谈了心力衰竭患者，以识别他们参与心脏康复的障碍和促进因素。结果显示，患者报告的障碍包括运动能力下降和缺乏动力，提示需要更有针对性的支持。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时期”：患者报告的心力衰竭心脏康复障碍。
items.titleEn: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summaryZh: 一项对心力衰竭患者进行的定性研究，识别了患者报告的参与心脏康复的障碍和促进因素，包括运动能力下降和缺乏动力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study interviewed heart failure patients to identify barriers and facilitators to cardiac rehabilitation participation. Findings highlight patient-reported barriers like reduced physical capacity and lack of motivation, suggesting a need for more targeted support.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量较小，结果具有初步性质。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, findings are preliminary.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: The DOPSknee tool demonstrated good on-site inter-rater reliability for assessing knee joint mobilization in 42 preclinical PT students, suggesting its validity for both on-site and off-site educational settings.
items.curatedReason: 该研究验证了 DOPSknee 工具在现场和离线场景下评估膝关节松动术的有效性和可靠性。对 PT 教育者而言，该工具为评估学生临床技能提供了标准化方法，但其在实际教育中的推广应用还需要更多实践数据。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗教育中膝关节松动术现场与非现场直接技能观察 (DOPS) 的有效性和可靠性。
items.titleEn: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summaryZh: DOPSknee 工具在对 42 名预科 PT 学生进行的膝关节松动术评估中，显示出良好的现场评分者间信度，表明其在现场和非现场教育环境中的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the DOPSknee tool for assessing knee joint mobilization skills in both on-site and off-site settings, demonstrating its reliability and validity. For PT educators, this offers a standardized method for student skill assessment, though further practical implementation data is needed.
items.limitation: 样本量较小，且只针对离线场景，其在真实临床中的推广仍需观察。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size and specific focus on off-site scenarios limit generalizability to broader clinical settings.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: A randomized external feasibility trial of the TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy self-management program for musculoskeletal pain found the intervention feasible for a definitive trial, with plans to compare it against usual NHS physiotherapy care.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 是一项结合数字疗法和物理治疗的自我管理项目，其可行性试验显示，该项目在招募和研究设计方面是可行的，为开展更大规模的 RCT 提供了基础。其在改善普通 NHS 物理治疗方面的实际益处仍需在后续研究中证明。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项用于肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持的自我管理计划的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估。
items.titleEn: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summaryZh: TRAK MSK（一项数字物理治疗支持的自我管理计划）的可行性试验表明，该干预措施适合进行最终试验，并将与常规 NHS 物理治疗进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: The feasibility trial for TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy-supported self-management program, indicates its viability for recruitment and study design, paving the way for larger RCTs. Its practical benefits over standard NHS physiotherapy require further demonstration.
items.limitation: 可行性试验，样本量较小，未提供明确的治疗效果数据。
items.limitationEn: Feasibility trial with a small sample size, lacking definitive treatment efficacy data.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey of Swedish physiotherapists indicated major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions after knee replacement, potentially affecting patient confidence and recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，在全髋关节置换术后长期活动限制方面的建议存在显著差异。这可能影响患者的信心和恢复，提示需要制定更统一的临床指南。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议存在重大差异：一项瑞典物理治疗师的调查。
items.titleEn: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查显示，膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议存在重大差异，这可能会影响患者的信心和恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of Swedish physiotherapists reveals significant discrepancies in recommendations for long-term activity restrictions post-total knee arthroplasty, potentially impacting patient confidence and recovery, highlighting a need for more standardized clinical guidelines.
items.limitation: 调查报告，未能直接评估患者结果，仅反映治疗师的观点。
items.limitationEn: Survey-based, it reflects therapist opinions rather than directly assessing patient outcomes.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review on the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation identified its potential but highlighted heterogeneity in assessment protocols and gaps in the evidence base for standardized implementation.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了增强步态变异性指数 (eGVI) 在神经和老年康复中的应用。虽然 eGVI 是一个有前景的指标，但其评估方案和临床应用仍需进一步标准化和研究。
items.titleZh: 神经和老年康复中增强步态变异性指数：一项范围综述。
items.titleEn: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summaryZh: 一项关于增强步态变异性指数 (eGVI) 在神经和老年康复中应用的范围综述，指出其潜力但强调了评估方案的异质性和标准化实施的证据差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps the application of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation. While eGVI is a promising metric, further standardization and research are needed to refine its assessment protocols and clinical implementation.
items.limitation: 范围综述，主要目的是梳理现有文献，而非提供新的临床证据。
items.limitationEn: Scoping review, primarily aims to map existing literature rather than provide new clinical evidence.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective piece argues for the importance of identifying early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, especially in younger adults, highlighting the need for greater clinical and research attention to this condition.
items.curatedReason: 该述评强调了早期识别有症状的髋关节骨关节炎的重要性，尤其是在年轻成人中。它指出了在诊断和治疗方面的现有关注点不足，并呼吁增加对这一领域的关注。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个机会之窗。
items.titleEn: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评文章强调了识别早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎的重要性，尤其是在年轻成人中，并指出需要更多的临床和研究关注。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective piece highlights the importance of identifying early symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, particularly in younger adults, noting the current lack of attention in diagnosis and treatment and calling for increased focus on this area.
items.limitation: 述评文章，不包含新的研究数据，而是作者的观点。
items.limitationEn: Perspective piece, does not contain new research data but rather authors' opinions.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey assessed sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness among football stakeholders in Cameroon, identifying knowledge gaps and system-level deficiencies relevant to low-resource settings.
items.curatedReason: 该研究揭示了喀麦隆足球界在心脏骤停 (SCA) 应对准备方面存在显著的知识和系统性缺陷。这警示我们，在低资源环境下，必须优先改进运动场所的应急响应能力和相关人员的培训，以保障运动员安全。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球中的心脏骤停防范：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.titleEn: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summaryZh: 一项评估喀麦隆足球界心脏骤停 (SCA) 准备情况的调查，揭示了低资源环境下运动场所存在的系统性差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals significant knowledge and systemic deficiencies in sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness within Cameroonian football. This highlights an urgent need to prioritize improvements in emergency response capabilities and training for stakeholders in low-resource settings to ensure athlete safety.
items.limitation: 研究集中于喀麦隆足球界，对其他运动和地区的可推广性有限。
items.limitationEn: Focuses on Cameroonian football; generalizability to other sports and regions is limited.

items.title: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summary: A survey of 40 South African physiotherapists indicated wide variations in knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation, suggesting a need for improved education and training.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查初步了解了南非物理治疗师在卒中康复中对运动学习的认识、态度和实践。结果显示知识和实践存在广泛差异，提示需要加强教育和培训，以优化卒中患者的运动恢复。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在卒中康复中运动学习的知识、态度和实践。
items.titleEn: Physiotherapists' knowledge, attitude and practice of motor learning in stroke rehabilitation.
items.summaryZh: 一项对 40 名南非物理治疗师的调查显示，他们在卒中康复中对运动学习的知识、态度和实践存在广泛差异，提示需要改进教育和培训。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey provides an initial look at South African physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and practices regarding motor learning in stroke rehabilitation. Findings reveal wide variations, suggesting a need for enhanced education and training to optimize motor recovery in stroke survivors.
items.limitation: 样本量小，且采用便利抽样，结果可能存在偏差。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size and convenience sampling may introduce bias.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summary: An institution-based cross-sectional study in Gondar Town, Ethiopia, assessed physiotherapy service utilization among stroke survivors, identifying factors associated with underutilization.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示，在埃塞俄比亚北部，中风康复患者的物理治疗利用率低，且受多种因素影响。这提示我们，在资源有限地区，提升中风康复服务的可及性和利用率，需要针对性的社区干预和医疗系统支持。
items.titleZh: 埃塞俄比亚 Gondar 镇医院中风幸存者物理治疗服务利用率及相关因素。
items.titleEn: Utilization of physiotherapy services and associated factors among stroke survivors attending hospitals in Gondar Town, Northwest Ethiopia.
items.summaryZh: 一项在埃塞俄比亚 Gondar 镇医院进行的研究，评估了中风幸存者接受物理治疗服务的利用率及相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals low physiotherapy utilization among stroke survivors in Northwest Ethiopia, linked to various factors. This suggests that in resource-limited settings, targeted community outreach and healthcare system support are crucial to enhance access and utilization of stroke rehabilitation services.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法确定因果关系，且研究地点有限。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study cannot establish causality; limited geographic scope.

items.title: [World Report] England's long-term resident doctors’ dispute ends
items.summary: After a three-year dispute, the British Medical Association has accepted the UK government's offer for improved pay and training for resident doctors.
items.curatedReason: 报道称，英国医学会已接受政府关于提高住院医师薪酬和培训的提议，标志着持续三年的医患纠纷的结束。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 英格兰住院医师长期纠纷结束
items.titleEn: [World Report] England's long-term resident doctors’ dispute ends
items.summaryZh: 经过长达三年的纠纷，英国医学会已接受政府关于提高住院医师薪酬和培训的提议。
items.curatedReasonEn: The British Medical Association has accepted the government's offer for improved pay and training for resident doctors, marking the end of a three-year dispute.
items.limitation: 新闻报道，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: News report, not research content.

items.title: [Health Policy] Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations
items.summary: This policy article highlights the need to integrate children's needs, perspectives, and rights into all policies, introducing the 'Children in All Policies 2030' initiative.
items.curatedReason: 这篇政策文章强调了在所有政策中纳入儿童需求的重要性，并介绍了“所有政策中的儿童 2030”全球合作项目，旨在促进面向可持续未来的参与式、跨部门政策制定。
items.titleZh: [卫生政策] 所有政策中的儿童：促进儿童和子孙后代健康福祉的全球合作经验教训
items.titleEn: [Health Policy] Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations
items.summaryZh: 这篇政策文章强调了在所有政策中纳入儿童需求的重要性，并介绍了“所有政策中的儿童 2030”全球合作项目，旨在促进面向可持续未来的参与式、跨部门政策制定。
items.curatedReasonEn: This policy piece underscores the importance of incorporating children's needs in all policies and introduces the 'Children in All Policies 2030' global collaboration, aimed at fostering participatory, intersectoral policymaking for a sustainable future.
items.limitation: 政策文章，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Policy piece, not research content.

items.title: Correction: Fasting and sports: a summary statement of the IOC workshop
items.summary: A correction notice in the British Journal of Sports Medicine corrects the spelling of author Pamela Venning's name in an article summarizing an IOC workshop on fasting and sports.
items.curatedReason: 此为《英国运动医学杂志》上的一篇更正声明，纠正了一篇关于禁食和运动的 IOC 工作坊摘要文章中作者姓名的拼写错误。
items.titleZh: 更正：禁食与运动：国际奥委会工作坊的摘要声明
items.titleEn: Correction: Fasting and sports: a summary statement of the IOC workshop
items.summaryZh: 《英国运动医学杂志》上一篇关于禁食与运动的国际奥委会工作坊摘要文章，对其作者 Pamela Venning 的姓名拼写进行了更正。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a correction notice from the British Journal of Sports Medicine, rectifying a misspelling of an author's name in a summary statement article about an IOC workshop on fasting and sports.
items.limitation: 更正声明，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Correction notice, not research content.

items.title: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summary: This perspective piece explores the intersection of elite athletic performance and long-term health, using personal experiences in figure skating to discuss challenges like body image and the physical toll of competition.
items.curatedReason: 这篇视角文章探讨了运动员在追求竞技巅峰的同时，如何平衡长期健康问题，特别是作者以自身花样滑冰经历为例，讨论了身体形象和运动带来的生理压力。
items.titleZh: 如履薄冰：平衡奥运追求与长期健康
items.titleEn: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章探讨了竞技体育追求与长期健康之间的平衡，作者以自身花样滑冰经历为例，讨论了身体形象和运动带来的生理压力。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective piece discusses the balance between Olympic pursuits and long-term health, with the author using their figure skating experience to illustrate challenges related to body image and the physiological demands of elite sports.
items.limitation: 视角文章，非研究性内容。
items.limitationEn: Perspective piece, not research content.

items.title: Early Weight-Bearing Speeds Recovery After Unstable Ankle Fracture Surgery: study
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that early weight-bearing and mobilization significantly speed recovery, improve functional outcomes, and progress rehabilitation after surgical fixation of unstable ankle fractures, without increasing complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 对于踝关节不稳骨折术后，早期负重可以显著加速恢复。这与传统延迟负重方案不同，支持你将早期负重和早期活动纳入踝关节不稳骨折术后康复方案，以优化患者功能预后。
items.titleZh: 早期负重可加速踝关节不稳骨折术后恢复
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，不稳固踝关节骨折手术内固定后，早期负重和活动显著加快恢复，改善功能结果，并促进康复进程，且不增加并发症发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: For unstable ankle fractures after surgery, early weight-bearing can significantly accelerate recovery. This differs from traditional delayed weight-bearing protocols and supports your integration of early weight-bearing and mobilization into post-surgical rehabilitation for unstable ankle fractures to optimize patient functional outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究侧重于术后早期恢复，长期并发症和功能预后的详细比较可能需要更长的随访时间。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on early postoperative recovery; detailed comparisons of long-term complications and functional outcomes might require longer follow-up.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials confirms the efficacy and safety of pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse.
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔器官脱垂（POP）有效且安全，其证据级别达到系统综述和荟萃分析。在临床实践中，你应该将 PFMT 作为 POP 患者的一线保守治疗方案，并能向患者明确其治疗获益。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析证实了盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂的有效性和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) is effective and safe for pelvic organ prolapse (POP), with evidence reaching the level of systematic review and meta-analysis. In clinical practice, you should incorporate PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients and clearly communicate its therapeutic benefits.
items.limitation: 尽管是系统综述，但不同研究中PFMT方案的强度、持续时间及患者依从性可能存在异质性。
items.limitationEn: Although a systematic review, heterogeneity may exist in the intensity, duration, and patient adherence of PFMT protocols across different studies.

items.title: APTA Report Finds Demand for Pelvic Health Physical Therapy Outpaces Access
items.summary: A new APTA report, "APTA State of Pelvic Health Physical Therapy," reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. currently outpaces access, identifying key challenges in workforce, awareness, and timely care.
items.curatedReason: APTA 报告指出，美国盆底物理治疗的需求远超供给。这意味着该领域市场潜力巨大，若你考虑专业发展或诊所扩张，盆底物理治疗无疑是一个值得抓住的增长点。不过，也要留意报告提及的劳动力、可及性和公众认知挑战，这会影响你把握市场机会的方式。
items.titleZh: APTA 报告：盆底物理治疗需求超出可及性
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会 (APTA) 的一份新报告《APTA 盆底物理治疗现状》显示，美国盆底物理治疗的需求目前超出了可及性，指出了劳动力、认知和及时护理方面的关键挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA report reveals that demand for pelvic health physical therapy in the U.S. significantly outpaces supply. This indicates immense market potential; if you're considering professional development or clinic expansion, pelvic health physical therapy is undeniably a growth area to seize. However, also pay attention to the workforce, access, and public awareness challenges mentioned in the report, as these will influence how you capitalize on market opportunities.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这项贝叶斯网络荟萃分析为卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的非药物干预提供了高等级证据。在制定患者康复方案时，你应优先采纳其中证据级别高的干预措施，以最大化患者的恢复潜力。该分析有助于指导你做出更精准的临床决策。
items.titleZh: 卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性：一项系统综述与贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian network meta-analysis provides high-level evidence for non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. When developing rehabilitation plans, you should prioritize interventions with strong evidence to maximize patient recovery potential. This analysis can guide you in making more precise clinical decisions.
items.limitation: 贝叶斯网络荟萃分析的局限性在于纳入研究的异质性可能影响结果的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of Bayesian network meta-analysis is that heterogeneity among included studies can affect the robustness of the results.

items.title: Prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury: a systematic review and meta-analysis for the female, woman and girl Athlete Injury pRevention (FAIR) consensus
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis identifies prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injury in female, woman, and girl athletes as part of the FAIR consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。你在指导女性运动员时，应参考这些证据来设计更具针对性的损伤预防方案，并关注女性特有的生理和生物力学因素。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员上肢损伤预防策略与可修改风险因素：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析作为 FAIR 共识的一部分，旨在确定女性运动员上肢损伤的预防策略和可修改风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes prevention strategies and modifiable risk factors for upper extremity injuries in female athletes. When coaching female athletes, you should refer to this evidence to design more targeted injury prevention programs and pay attention to female-specific physiological and biomechanical factors.
items.limitation: 系统综述的局限在于纳入研究的异质性，可能导致证据等级和结论的适用范围受限。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of systematic reviews is the heterogeneity of included studies, which can restrict the applicability of evidence levels and conclusions.

items.title: The Impact of a Single Bout of Antagonist Stretching on Agonist Muscle Performance and Range of Motion: A Systematic review and Meta-analysis
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the impact of a single bout of antagonist stretching on agonist muscle performance and range of motion, addressing conflicting findings in current literature.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响。在制定热身或拉伸方案时，你需要权衡拮抗肌牵伸对后续运动表现的潜在影响，尤其是需要爆发力的运动，确保平衡柔韧性与力量输出的需求。
items.titleZh: 拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析调查了拮抗肌单次牵伸对激动肌表现和关节活动范围的影响，旨在解决当前文献中存在的冲突发现。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis suggests that a single bout of antagonist stretching might affect agonist muscle performance. When designing warm-up or stretching protocols, you need to carefully weigh the potential impact of antagonist stretching on subsequent explosive power, ensuring a balance between flexibility and power output.
items.limitation: 系统综述和荟萃分析可能存在纳入研究异质性，导致结果解释需谨慎，且对不同运动类型的影响可能不同。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews and meta-analyses may have heterogeneity among included studies, requiring cautious interpretation of results, and the impact on different sports types may vary.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对肩周炎患者的疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量有显著改善。将 PNE 纳入肩周炎的综合治疗方案中，能增强患者的自我效能和症状管理能力。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对肩周炎患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验探讨了疼痛神经科学教育对肩周炎患者疼痛、运动恐惧症、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) significantly improves pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder. Integrating PNE into a comprehensive treatment plan for frozen shoulder can enhance patient self-efficacy and symptom management.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心随机对照试验，其结果外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center randomized controlled trial, and the generalizability of its findings may be limited.

items.title: Effects of OsteoStrong vs. dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women in the BONEMORE randomized controlled trial
items.summary: The BONEMORE randomized controlled trial compared the effects of OsteoStrong versus dynamic multicomponent exercise on physical function in older women.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明 OsteoStrong 训练与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能改善相似。作为一种新兴的骨骼强化方案，OsteoStrong 为骨质疏松或肌少症风险患者提供了除传统运动外的另一种选择，但其长期效果和适用人群仍需更多研究支持。
items.titleZh: OsteoStrong 与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能影响的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: BONEMORE 随机对照试验比较了 OsteoStrong 与多组分动态运动对老年女性身体功能的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that OsteoStrong training offers similar improvements in physical function for older women compared to multicomponent dynamic exercise. As an emerging bone-strengthening program, OsteoStrong provides an alternative to traditional exercise for patients at risk of osteoporosis or sarcopenia, though its long-term effects and target population require further research.
items.limitation: 研究对象为老年女性，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were older women, and the results may not be generalizable to other populations.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain
items.summary: This biokinetic study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain, suggesting that these factors may not be directly linked to pelvic kinematics in this population.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者骨盆运动改变无相关性，挑战了“髋脊联动”理论的某些方面。你在评估腰痛患者时，不应过度强调髋关节活动度与力量作为骨盆异常运动的预测指标。
items.titleZh: 髋脊联动：腰痛患者髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 这项生物动力学研究发现，腰痛患者的髋关节力量或柔韧性与骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性，表明这些因素可能与该人群的骨盆运动学没有直接联系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in low back pain patients, challenging certain aspects of the "hip-spine relationship" theory. When assessing low back pain patients, you should not overemphasize hip range of motion and strength as predictors of abnormal pelvic motion.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，不能建立因果关系，且研究人群特定，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality, and the specific study population limits generalizability.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline
items.summary: This 25-year orthopedic literature review systematically evaluated the impact of mattress characteristics on sleep quality, low back pain, and spinal health, finding that inadequate bedding support can contribute to various discomforts upon awakening.
items.curatedReason: 这份 25 年的系统综述明确，床垫支撑不足会导致醒后不适。向患者提供改善睡眠质量和缓解腰痛的建议时，务必根据其中关于床垫硬度、材料和支撑的结论，指导他们选择合适的床垫，因为这直接关系到脊柱健康。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和背痛的影响：一项 25 年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 这项为期 25 年的骨科文献综述系统评估了床垫特性对睡眠质量、腰痛和脊柱健康的影响，发现不充分的卧具支撑可能导致醒来时的各种不适。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 25-year systematic review clearly states that inadequate mattress support can lead to discomfort upon awakening. When advising patients on improving sleep quality and alleviating low back pain, you must guide them in selecting appropriate mattresses based on the conclusions regarding firmness, materials, and support, as this directly impacts spinal health.
items.limitation: 系统综述可能存在异质性，不同研究之间的床垫类型、评估方法和患者特征差异可能影响结果的综合解释。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews may have heterogeneity, where differences in mattress types, assessment methods, and patient characteristics across studies can affect the integrated interpretation of results.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized, single-blind, controlled trial demonstrated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明沉浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难有效且安全。你可以考虑将其作为传统吞咽康复的有效辅助手段，尤其对于需要强化生物反馈和增强患者依从性的患者。这一技术有望提升吞咽康复的参与度和效果。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式 sEMG 触发虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的疗效与安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机、单盲、对照试验证实了沉浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练对卒中后吞咽困难的有效性和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training is effective and safe for post-stroke dysphagia. You might consider it as an effective adjunct to traditional dysphagia rehabilitation, especially for patients requiring enhanced biofeedback and improved adherence. This technology has the potential to boost engagement and outcomes in dysphagia rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究为单盲设计，可能存在安慰剂效应或研究者偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study used a single-blind design, which may introduce placebo effects or researcher bias.

items.title: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG for predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke
items.summary: This research investigates whether integrating serum neurotrophin profiles with quantitative electroencephalography (qEEG) parameters enhances predictive accuracy for 6-month motor outcomes beyond conventional clinical factors in acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 整合血清神经营养因子和定量脑电图（qEEG）可以提高急性缺血性卒中患者运动功能预后的预测准确性。这提示你在评估患者预后时，可以考虑结合多模态生物标志物，提供更全面的信息，从而优化康复方案的制定。
items.titleZh: 整合血清神经营养因子和定量脑电图预测急性缺血性卒中运动结局
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了整合血清神经营养因子谱和定量脑电图（qEEG）参数是否能提高急性缺血性卒中患者 6 个月运动结局的预测准确性，超越传统临床因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Integrating serum neurotrophin profiles and quantitative EEG (qEEG) can enhance the accuracy of predicting motor outcomes in acute ischemic stroke patients. This suggests that when assessing patient prognosis, you might consider combining multimodal biomarkers to provide more comprehensive information and optimize rehabilitation planning.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，可能存在未控制的混杂因素影响结果，且结果需要前瞻性大规模研究验证。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which may have uncontrolled confounding factors affecting the results, and the findings require validation in larger prospective studies.

items.title: Risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field: a methodological scoping review | BMC Sports Science, Medicine and Rehabilitation
items.summary: This methodological scoping review identifies risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injury in youth track and field, noting widespread injuries due to growth, maturation, and escalating training loads, as well as inconsistencies in definitions and measurement approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这份方法学范围综述总结了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素。你在指导青少年运动员时，应整合这些因素来制定损伤预防策略，尤其要关注与生长、成熟和训练负荷相关的风险。
items.titleZh: 青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素：一项方法学范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项方法学范围综述确定了青少年田径运动员肌肉骨骼损伤的风险和保护因素，指出广泛的损伤是由于生长、成熟和训练负荷增加，以及定义和测量方法的不一致造成的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This methodological scoping review summarizes risk and protective factors for musculoskeletal injuries in youth track and field athletes. When coaching youth athletes, you should integrate these factors to develop injury prevention strategies, with particular attention to risks associated with growth, maturation, and training loads.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于其主要目的是识别文献，不进行质量评估或荟萃分析，故不能提供量化的效应大小。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of a scoping review is its primary purpose to identify literature, not to perform quality assessment or meta-analysis, thus it cannot provide quantified effect sizes.

items.title: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears yields favorable healing rates: a systematic review | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review reports on current surgical techniques, patient-reported outcome measures, and quantifies healing rates following repair of radial meniscus tears.
items.curatedReason: 对径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率。在临床中，当你遇到这类撕裂时，可以自信地向患者推荐手术修复，并告知其预期的良好愈合效果。但仍需关注长期功能预后数据。
items.titleZh: 径向半月板撕裂的手术修复显示出良好的愈合率：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述报告了径向半月板撕裂的当前手术技术、患者报告结局测量结果，并量化了修复后的愈合率。
items.curatedReasonEn: Surgical repair of radial meniscus tears demonstrates favorable healing rates. In clinical practice, when encountering such tears, you can confidently recommend surgical repair to patients and inform them of the expected positive healing outcomes. However, long-term functional outcomes still warrant attention.
items.limitation: 系统综述可能存在异质性，且愈合率的定义和评估标准可能因研究而异，影响结果的统一性。
items.limitationEn: Systematic reviews may have heterogeneity, and the definition and assessment criteria for healing rates can vary across studies, affecting the consistency of results.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated the knowledge of pelvic floor health and the prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs) in female athletes, identifying impacts of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了女性运动员盆底知识不足及盆底功能障碍（PFDs）与运动类型、强度和人口学因素之间的关系。你在对女性运动员进行评估和运动方案设计时，应主动筛查 PFDs，并考虑将盆底健康教育纳入运动训练指导。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识与功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了女性运动员盆底健康知识和盆底功能障碍 (PFDs) 的患病率，并确定了人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals inadequate pelvic floor knowledge and the relationship between pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs) and sports type, intensity, and demographic factors in female athletes. When assessing female athletes and designing exercise programs, you should proactively screen for PFDs and consider integrating pelvic floor health education into sports training guidance.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法确定因果关系，且数据依赖自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents causal inference, and reliance on self-reported data may introduce recall bias.

items.title: Differences in Pelvic Floor Morphometry for Women with Persistent Pelvic Pain and Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis—A Cross-Sectional Study
items.summary: This cross-sectional study describes differences in pelvic floor morphometry for a large population of women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis compared to those without pain.
items.curatedReason: 本研究发现慢性盆腔疼痛伴深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性的盆底形态学存在差异。你在评估这类患者时，应关注盆底结构的特异性改变，将其作为辅助诊断和制定个性化康复方案的参考依据。
items.titleZh: 慢性盆腔疼痛伴深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症女性盆底形态学差异的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究描述了患有持续性盆腔疼痛和深部浸润性子宫内膜异位症的女性与无疼痛女性盆底形态学上的差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found differences in pelvic floor morphometry in women with persistent pelvic pain and deep infiltrating endometriosis. When evaluating such patients, you should pay attention to specific changes in pelvic floor structures as a reference for auxiliary diagnosis and developing personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法建立盆底形态改变与疼痛的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between pelvic floor morphological changes and pain.

items.title: Clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices compared to traditional methods: a systematic review with limited meta-analysis | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research
items.summary: This systematic review with limited meta-analysis compared the clinical and functional outcomes of upper extremity 3D-printed immobilization devices to traditional methods.
items.curatedReason: 该系统综述显示，3D 打印固定设备在临床和功能结果上与传统方法相似。你可以将 3D 打印技术作为传统石膏和支具的可行替代或补充方案，尤其是在追求定制化和提升患者舒适度时。
items.titleZh: 上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法的临床和功能结果比较：系统综述与有限荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项包含有限荟萃分析的系统综述比较了上肢 3D 打印固定设备与传统方法的临床和功能结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review indicates that 3D-printed immobilization devices yield similar clinical and functional outcomes to traditional methods. You can consider 3D printing technology as a viable alternative or supplement to traditional casts and braces, especially when aiming for customization and improved patient comfort.
items.limitation: 该系统综述为“有限荟萃分析”，可能存在研究异质性，且长期效果和成本效益方面数据仍有待观察。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review includes a "limited meta-analysis," suggesting potential study heterogeneity, and long-term effects and cost-effectiveness data are still pending.

items.title: MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease
items.summary: This research provides MRI-based evidence of rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and its correlation with disease duration in Parkinson’s disease, linking it to cerebrospinal fluid dynamics and glymphatic system function.
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大与病程相关，这可能为该疾病的进展提供新的影像学生物标志物。你在评估帕金森病患者时，除了运动症状，还应关注颈部肌肉的影像学变化，这可能有助于理解疾病的病理生理进展。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大与病程相关性的 MRI 证据
items.summaryZh: 这项研究提供了帕金森病患者颈后小直肌肥大及其与病程相关的 MRI 证据，并将其与脑脊液动力学和胶淋巴系统功能联系起来。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals a correlation between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and disease duration in Parkinson's disease, potentially offering a new imaging biomarker for disease progression. When assessing Parkinson's patients, you should consider cervical muscle imaging changes in addition to motor symptoms, as this may aid in understanding pathophysiological progression.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面研究，无法确定颈后小直肌肥大与帕金森病程的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between rectus capitis posterior minor hypertrophy and the progression of Parkinson's disease.

items.title: Glucagon-like peptide-1 agonists in Parkinson's disease: a meta-analysis
items.summary: This meta-analysis systematically evaluates the efficacy and safety of glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease, distinguishing between symptomatic relief and potential disease modification, given conflicting clinical trial results.
items.curatedReason: 关于 GLP-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的荟萃分析显示，其在临床试验中的疗效和安全性存在冲突结果。你在评估帕金森病患者的治疗时，需认识到 GLP-1 激动剂在运动症状缓解和疾病改善方面尚无定论，不应将其作为常规治疗推荐。
items.titleZh: 胰高血糖素样肽-1 激动剂在帕金森病中的应用：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析系统评估了胰高血糖素样肽-1 受体激动剂在帕金森病中的疗效和安全性，鉴于临床试验结果存在冲突，区分了对症缓解和潜在疾病改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis of GLP-1 receptor agonists in Parkinson's disease shows conflicting results regarding their efficacy and safety in clinical trials. When evaluating treatments for Parkinson's patients, you should recognize that GLP-1 agonists have no conclusive benefit for motor symptom relief or disease modification and should not be recommended as routine treatment.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析的结果受限于纳入试验的质量和异质性，可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The meta-analysis results are limited by the quality and heterogeneity of included trials and may suffer from publication bias.

items.title: Neurorobotics for Neurorehabilitation: Clinical Applications and Future Research Direction
